meta.title: Prudentia Micro Dental Care
meta.description: Discreet and comfortable teeth straightening with clear aligners in Pimple Saudagar

hero.title: Restore Your Smile with Natural-Looking Composite Fillings
hero.subtitle: Natural-Looking

introduction.text: At Prudentia Micro Dental Care, Pimple Saudagar we use composite (tooth-colored) fillings to repair teeth affected by decay, cracks, or fractures seamlessly blending with your natural tooth for a strong and beautiful result.
introduction.highlightedText: Prudentia Micro Dental Care, Pimple Saudagar

whatAreCompositeFillings.title: What Are Composite Fillings?
whatAreCompositeFillings.description: Composite fillings are made from a tooth-colored resin material that bonds directly to your natural tooth. Unlike traditional metal fillings, they offer a more aesthetic and conservative solution. Composite fillings are strong, long-lasting, and ideal for restoring both function and appearance.

recommendations.title: When Are Composite Fillings Recommended?
recommendations.subtitle: Composite fillings are an excellent choice for treating and repairing:

procedure.title: How Is the Procedure Done?
procedure.subtitle: Most composite fillings can be completed in just one comfortable appointment.

steps.title: Numbing
steps.description: The area is gently numbed to ensure a painless experience.

steps.title: Cleaning
steps.description: The decayed or damaged portion of the tooth is carefully removed.

steps.title: Preparation
steps.description: The tooth is cleaned and prepped. If the decay is close to the nerve, a protective liner may be applied.

steps.title: Filling Placement
steps.description: The composite material is applied in layers, shaped, hardened with a special light, and polished to perfection — restoring your tooth's natural shape and function.

aftercare.title: Aftercare & Longevity
aftercare.subtitle: With proper care, composite fillings can last for many years.

tips.title: Maintain good oral hygiene
tips.description: brush twice daily and floss regularly

tips.title: Schedule regular dental visits
tips.description: early detection extends the life of your restorations

aftercare.closingText: We will provide you with personalized care instructions after your appointment.

cta.title: Book Your Appointment Today
cta.description: Whether it's a minor chip or a new cavity, composite fillings can restore your smile beautifully and discreetly.
cta.callToAction: Call us today to schedule your consultation at Prudentia Micro Dental Care where function meets aesthetics, and your smile gets the care it deserves.
